description: Please donate to my paypal at paypal.me/psvangorp or ko-fi at ko-fi.com/pitapitabread  . You can contact me by email pitabreadandroid (at) gmail.com and change (at) to @ . Here are more than 100 game ROMs in .img image format for the classic Playstation 1 platform. These files were generated or come from different sources, including optical discs, other ROMs and from (the SD cards) of Chinese game player devices. The files should conform to the CloneCD image format. The the files are compatible witth many cheap Chinese game consoles such as as the PS5000 and the Game Stick 4k Lite and other cheap emulation consoles. When you find PSX (PS1) game ROMs online and are CUE BIN files then you can convert them to CloneCD IMG files in the UltraISO program . * You must Login https://archive.org/account/login  here on this website Internet Archive to download files. * Click HERE to see the list of games that are in the RAR files, or scroll down on this page. The updated list is on this page, down below. Download and unrar all of the RAR files from this page. BIOS data can go into an appropriate folder on the storage medium of your game device depending on the requirements. Maybe the BIOS would go into the \system folder or \bios folder or \res folder or \retroarch or another. Game ROM data can go into an appropriate folder on the same storage medium of the device such as the \download folder or \roms folder or another. You will have to investigate and determine what is best for your game device. Good luck, and happy retro gaming!
